member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ReaderModel.Setup
member.summary: Connnect with reader after instance creation

member.name: T:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ReaderModel.TagReadHandler
member.summary: Delegate for tag read event
member.param: array of tag data

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ReaderModel.SetTriggerMode
member.summary: Set trigger mode to rfid on resume / screen appearance or start

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ReaderModel.ConfigureReader(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configure Reader Setup event listnere and enable required event types Set trigger mode to rfid Configure antenna, singulation and trigger setting using single API call

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.setupSDKHandler(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Setup the SDK handler

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.ConnectScanner(System.Int32)
member.summary: Connect to the scanner

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DisconnectScanner(System.String)
member.summary: Disonnect to the scanner

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.UpdateScanner(System.String)
member.summary: Update the firmware

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventBarcode(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: The event responsible for capturing the barcode data.
member.param: Barcode data
Barcode type of the scanned barcode. Values of bar code data types
Unique identifier of a particular active scanner assigned by SDK

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventBinaryData(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: The event responsible for capturing the binary data.
member.param: Object representing raw data of the received Intelligent Document Capture(IDC) data.
Unique identifier of a particular active scanner assigned by SDK

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventCommunicationSessionEstablished(Com.Zebra.Scannercontrol.DCSScannerInfo)
member.summary: The event responsible for capturing the scanner connection
member.param: Object representing an appeared active scanner.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventCommunicationSessionTerminated(System.Int32)
member.summary: "Session Terminated" notification informs about disappearance of a particular active scanner
member.param: Unique identifier of a disappeared active scanner assigned by SDK

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventFirmwareUpdate(Com.Zebra.Scannercontrol.FirmwareUpdateEvent)
member.summary: The event responsible for capturing the firmware update data.
member.param: Firmware update information

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.startNewFirmware
member.summary: Start the new firmware

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventImage(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: The event responsible for capturing the Image data.
member.param: Object representing raw data of the received image.
Unique identifier of a particular active scanner assigned by SDK.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventScannerAppeared(Com.Zebra.Scannercontrol.DCSScannerInfo)
member.summary: Device Arrival" notification informs about appearance of a particular available scanner
member.param: Object representing an appeared available scanner.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventScannerDisappeared(System.Int32)
member.summary: The event responsible for capturing the scanner disappearing.
member.param: Unique identifier of a disappeared available scanner assigned by SDK.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.Models.ScannerModel.DcssdkEventVideo(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: The event responsible for handling the video data.
member.param: Object representing raw data of the received video frame
Unique identifier of a particular active scanner assigned by SDK.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.FirmwareUpdateViewModel.CurrentProgressUpdate(Com.Zebra.Rfid.Api3.IEvents.FirmwareUpdateEvent)
member.summary: // This method is called to update the current progress of the firmware update. For EM45 and TC53E-RFID devices, it will update the progress of the firmware update from the RFID reader.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.FirmwareUpdateViewModel.CurrentProgressUpdate(System.Int32)
member.summary: This method is called to update the current progress of the firmware update. For RFD40, RFD90, TC22R, TC27R, it will update the progress of the firmware update from the RFID reader.

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.ReaderListViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: View model for reader list Creates observable collection for reader list Updates reader list

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.ReaderListViewModel.UpdateReaderList
member.summary: Clear observable collection for reader list Updates reader list from available readers Update connection status and populate name and serial number fields

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.ReaderListViewModel.ItemSelected(System.Object)
member.summary: On tap of item from list connect if not connected, disconnect if already connected
member.param: tapped reader item

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.ReaderListViewModel.ReaderConnectionEvent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Delegate subscribed for reader connection and disconnection event
member.param: whether connect or disconnected

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MVVM.ViewModels.ReaderListViewModel.ReaderAppearanceEvent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Delegate subscribed for reader connection and disconnection event
member.param: Reader appeared/attached or disappeared/detach

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MainActivity.CreateDirectory
member.summary: Create directory for store the firmware plugin(Plugin should be ".SCNPLG")

member.name: M:MauiRfidSample.MainActivity.CheckFileReadWritePermissions
member.summary: Check application permissions

member.name: T:MauiRfidSample.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
